data.title: University of Phoenix researchers present studies on human-AI collaboration and AI-ready healthcare curriculum at AECT 2026 Online Conference
data.description: Scholars from the College of Doctoral Studies and CEITR at the University of Phoenix recently collaborated on research related to the interaction between humans and artificial intelligence (AI) in cognitive tasks. This research, presented on March 20, 2026, in Phoenix, explores the readiness of healthcare professionals to effectively work alongside AI technologies. Key findings from the study were shared by the researchers, highlighting the importance of preparing healthcare professionals for the increasing integration of AI in their daily practices. Such collaboration was crucial to address the challenges and opportunities presented by AI in healthcare.

data.title: Riga to Host Northern Europe's Leading Deep Tech Conference "Deep Tech Atelier 2026"
data.description: Registration is currently available for the Deep Tech Atelier 2026, the premier conference for science-driven innovation in Northern Europe. Scheduled for May 14-15, 2026, in Riga, this event is in its eighth year and is expected to attract over 2,000 attendees from 60+ nations.

data.title: In HelloNation, Pest Control Expert Chris David of Staten Island, NY, Breaks Down DIY Pest Control Mistakes
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Staten Island, a PRNewswire article discussed the common issue of DIY pest control failing to effectively eliminate infestations and potentially exacerbating the problem. The article featured insights from Pest Control Expert Chris David from Recon Pest Control Inc. located in Staten Island, NY. David highlights the reasons behind this phenomenon, shedding light on the complexities and challenges faced by individuals attempting DIY pest control.

data.title: Leatt Announces Date of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: In Cape Town, South Africa, on March 20, 2026, Leatt Corporation (OTCQB: LEAT), a prominent company specializing in head-to-toe protective gear for various sports, particularly extreme and high-velocity activities, has revealed its intention to disclose its financial outcomes.

data.title: VARON Launches Official Recertified Oxygen Concentrators: Trusted Performance, Accessible Price
data.description: On March 20, 2026, VARON unveiled its latest product, the Official Recertified Oxygen Concentrator machines, introducing cost-effective oxygen therapy solutions to the market. These machines, known for their superior quality, are now available at a reduced price compared to new devices. VARON, a top player in the field of advanced oxygen therapy solutions, aims to make quality healthcare equipment more accessible to customers.

data.title: Novartis Strikes $3 Billion Deal For Next-Gen Breast Cancer Drug
data.description: Novartis AG has finalized an agreement to purchase a next-generation PI3Kα inhibitor program from Synnovation Therapeutics, as part of its effort to enhance its breast cancer pipeline. The acquisition of SNV4818, an oral, pan-mutant–selective PI3Kα inhibitor currently in Phase 1/2 trials for breast cancer and advanced solid tumors, is focused on treating HR-positive, HER2-negative breast cancer patients. Approximately 40% of these patients possess PIK3CA mutations associated with unfavorable outcomes. Novartis aims to bolster its oncology portfolio by developing precision medicines such as SNV4818 that can complement existing therapies like CDK inhibitors and endocrine therapies. This strategic move aligns with Novartis’ goal of improving treatment options in the breast cancer space.
